subject: docs(claude): replace Triggers section with glow-props 48-trigger version
body:
Cross-fleet alignment per 2026-04-17 policy. Replaces the legacy 9
single-word triggers (rev/aud/doc/tap/cln/perf/sec/dbg/imp + start/go)
with the redesigned 48-trigger / 8-group taxonomy, 6 cadence meta sweeps,
7 reflective passes, and scope modifiers (branch/staged/file).

Added an AI Notes line documenting trigger-name vs repo-path collisions
(docs/, src/config/, src/types/, src/db/, npm test, etc.) with a
precedence rule so future trigger runs aren't ambiguous.

Confirm checks pass: exactly one ## Triggers heading, all 8 group tables
present, no leftover rev/aud/start/go references.

Tags: docs, claude-md, fleet-alignment
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
